headline: Berkshire Looked Like It Got a Bargain on Alphabet Stock. It Didn’t.
summary: Alphabet’s big stock drop was spurred by a Google DeepMind scientist who is leaving for Anthropic. His departure is a blow to Alphabet’s AI initiatives.

raw.headline: Berkshire Looked Like It Got a Bargain on Alphabet Stock. It Didn’t.

headline: Berkshire Just Broke Warren Buffett’s Most Famous Rule and Poured $2.65 Billion Into This Airline
summary: Berkshire Hathaway, now under CEO Greg Abel, disclosed in its Q1 2026 13F filing the acquisition of almost 40 million shares of Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL), a position valued at approximately $2.65 billion. The disclosure landed alongside full exits from Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH), and Domino’s Pizza (NASDAQ:DPZ), which makes the airline buy the loudest signal of a ... Berkshire Just Broke Warren Buffett’s Most Famous Rule and Poured $2.65 Billion Into This Airline

headline: American Express Company (AXP): A Top Financial Stock to Buy According to Warren Buffett
summary: We just covered the 10 Best Financial Stocks to Buy According to Warren Buffett and American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) ranks 1st on this list. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is a long-term pick in the 13F portfolio of Berkshire Hathaway. The stock has featured in the portfolio of the fund since the fourth quarter of 2010. […]

headline: You could use your tax refund to pay off debt — but should you? 4 questions to ask yourself
summary: Don't immediately use an unexpected cash infusion to pay off certain types of debt. Here's what you need to know.
